titleStmt.title: SII 7.212: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 212. (A.R. No. 42 of 1901). ON ANOTHER SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ [.] jīyā
ttrailōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . 1 śrīmadvīrajinēṁdratī¨rtthasarasīhaṁ
sapravēkairumāsvādhisvāmisamaṁtabhadravilasadbhaṭṭākalaṁkādibhiḥ . jai
nēṁdraṁ śrutamuddhṛtaṁ trijagatīsāraṁ punastasya ca prōdva¨rtmanmunidānisugra
haravīṁstī¨rtthaṁkarānmanmahē . 2 pratibōdhise munibhadravratipatijainēṁdraśāstra
duddhṛti janma . vratatikuṭhārōddhṛtiyeṁdatiśayamati dhāni sū¨ryyatī¨rttha¨rddhanama
ṁ . 3 Adeṁteṁdoḍe . svasti . śrīmatu śakavaruṣa 1437 saṁda va¨rttamāna yiva saṁva
tsarada vaiśākha śuddha 5 yū guruvāradaṁdu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja raja
paramēśvara śrīvīra kruṣṇarāyamahārāyara rājyābhyudayakāladalu . śrīma
nmahābhāgadhēyaruṁ . tadājñādhararuṁ . saptasaptatidu¨rggādhīśvara mēdinīmīsa
ragaṁḍa . śrīmadbaicadaṁḍādhipagōtragaganamaṁḍalamā¨rttaṁḍamaṁḍa
laruṁ . jainaparamāgamōddharaṇadattāvadhānaruṁ . samyaktvaguṇaratnabhūṣa
ṇabhūṣitarumappa ratnappoḍeyaru maṁgalūra bārakūra rājyavanu
pratipālisutta yi¨rdda kāladalu śrīmadabhinavacārukī¨rttipaṁḍitadē
varugaḷa nirūpadiṁda munibhadradēvarugaḷu . ślōka . śrutāttatvaparāma
¨rśaḥ śrutātsamayava¨rddhanaṁ . tī¨rtatābhāvataḥ sa¨rvvaṁ śrutādhīnaṁ hi śāsa
naṁ . 4 yeṁdu jaināgamada mahāprabhāvava nupadēśisi pratibōdhisalā
gi bidireyanagarada yeṁṭumaṁdi seṭṭikāṟaru nālvaru yeḷamegaḷo
ḷagāda samastahalara Anumatiyiṁda kalikāladu¨rllabhamahābhyudayaniśrēyasa
lakṣmīsaṁpādakaparamajinaśāstrādaraṇanimittavāgi nityadalu jinaśāstra naḍava
ṁtāgi śāstradānakke koṭṭa bhavyajanaṁgaḷa hesaru sēnagaṇada va¨rddhamāna śrīAvvagaḷu caṁda
ladēviyarāda baṭṭiheggaḍeyaru piṇnāṇajilara kumāra kāmirāyaru baggā
ṁjiya gummaṇaseṭṭiyaru ciṭṭepāḍiya mayidiseṭṭiyaru beṭṭekēriya
dāsuseṭṭiyaru sēmita dēvaruseṭṭiyaru māṇipāḍiya nāgaṇaseṭṭiyaru
paḍiyoḷa mayidiseṭṭi paṁḍi kāṁtuseṭṭi Āḷuva kōṭiseṭṭiyaru beṁjana va¨rddhamā
naseṭṭiyaru maṇiyō nēmiseṭṭiyaru pāḍita va¨rddhamānaseṭṭiyaru Āḷuva pāṁ
ḍiseṭṭiyaru Āḷuva nāraṇaseṭṭiyaru koṁḍe pāṁḍiseṭṭiyaru seṭṭi pāṁḍiseṭṭiyaru Uḷḷiya bhīma
seṭṭiyaru buḍeṁga seṭṭiyaru pariyoḷa guṁmaṭaseṭṭi nelli dēvuseṭṭiyaru peruvalu sāṁtise
ṭṭiyaru kuṁdaḷi nāraṇaseṭṭiyaru cauḷiseṭṭiya maga sāṁtaṇaseṭṭiyaru [Ajila] pāṁ
ḍiseṭṭiyaru parikāra jāruseṭṭiyaru seṁtaṇi va¨rddhamānaseṭṭiyaru kōja hosabu
seṭṭiyaru koṭṭari va¨rddhamānaseṭṭiyaru biḷiya nēmuseṭṭiyaru cavuṭa sāṁta
yaseṭṭiyaru paruvalu vumaṇaseṭṭiyaru yiṁtinidarugaḷu pratyēkavāgi yippattu
yippattu doḍḍavarana koṭṭa lekkadalu Āda varaha ga 660 Akṣaradalu doḍḍavaraha Ā
ṟunora Aṟuvattu yi honnanu Appaṁtā kṣētragaḷalli koṭṭu tāmrada patragaḷa barasi
koṁḍu pā¨rśvadēvara bhaṁḍāradalli hāki Ā kṣētragaḷiṁda baṁda gēṇiya Akkiyi
ṁda nūṟu varaha baḍḍiya Akkiya mūḍe 25 ttayidanu siddhāṁtada nityapū
jege koṭṭu mēlāda ga 560 varahana baḍḍiya gēṇiya Akkiyanu śāstradānakke Ācaṁ
drā¨rkkavāgi trikaraṇaśuddhiyiṁda koṭṭu kī¨rttipuṇyagaḷa Upā¨rjjisi koṁḍaru .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō herēccavasuṁdharāṁ [.] ṣaṣṭiṁ varuṣasahasrāṇi vi
ṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . 5 dānapālanayō¨rmmadhyē dānācchrēyōnupālana
ṁ . dānātsva¨rggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . 6 maṁgalamahā śrī [.]
haribhaṭṭarige koṁḍe birumaṇaseṭṭiyara bhāge 1 kkaṁ varaha gadyā
ṇaṁ ga 20 kke suriya caṁdayaseṭṭiyara bhāge 1 kkaṁ varaha gadyāṇa 20 kkaṁ
ĀIri mayiṁdaseṭṭiyara bhāge 1 kkaṁ varaha gadyāṇaṁ ga 20 kkaṁ kakkeḷu jā
maṇaseṭṭi peṟuvalu sāṁti seṭṭiyaru sahitavāgi gadyāṇaṁ ga 20 kkaṁ
seṭṭi madanaseṭṭi śāstradānakke koṭṭa varaha gadyāṇaṁ 20 śrī .
Digital edition of SII 7.212 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
